tiktok_script:
Hook: Here's something nobody teaches you in school — one income stream is a single point of failure. And in this economy, that's a risk you can't afford to ignore.

Beat 1: Think about it. One job, one salary, one source. If anything shifts — a layoff, a slow season, an unexpected expense — the whole thing shakes. That's not worst-case thinking. That's just how single-point systems work.

Beat 2: Building a second income stream doesn't mean quitting your job or going all-in on something risky. It means adding a layer. Something that works in the background. Something you build once and keep. The Passive Income Blueprint is a step-by-step resource that shows you exactly how to do that — in plain language, at your own pace.

Beat 3: It's twenty-seven dollars. Not a subscription. Not a course you'll never finish. A practical blueprint you own forever. Costs less than dinner out and could be worth a lot more than that the first time you actually use it.

CTA: The link is in the description. Go to Smarter Hustle Academy dot com slash start. Mindset Sunday is a great day to make one smart move.
